Defines display orientation, color, shape, and dimensions for the Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines several preprocessor macros related to display configurations. It includes macros for different display orientations such as `DISPLAY_ORIENTATION_COLUMN_MAJOR_INVERTED`, `DISPLAY_ORIENTATION_ROTATED_180`, `DISPLAY_ORIENTATION_ROW_MAJOR`, and `DISPLAY_ORIENTATION_ROW_MAJOR_INVERTED`. It also defines macros for display types, `PBL_BW` for black and white and `PBL_COLOR` for color displays, as well as `PBL_RECT` and `PBL_ROUND` for rectangular and round displays, respectively. The file specifies the display dimensions with `PBL_DISPLAY_WIDTH` and `PBL_DISPLAY_HEIGHT`, and provides legacy display dimensions with `LEGACY_2X_DISP_COLS`, `LEGACY_2X_DISP_ROWS`, `LEGACY_3X_DISP_COLS`, and `LEGACY_3X_DISP_ROWS`. Additionally, it calculates the total number of bytes in the display framebuffer using the macro `DISPLAY_FRAMEBUFFER_BYTES`.
